subject: [AAF] Give `identities.dat` to working deployments
commit_message:
[AAF] Give `identities.dat` to working deployments

Today, `identities.dat` is put on cassandra deployment. But this file is
actually needed by "working" deployments (at least certman and service)
and not by cassandra.
This patch removes it from cassandra deployments and add it to the other
ones form "authz" family.

Issue-ID: OOM-2678
Signed-off-by: Sylvain Desbureaux <sylvain.desbureaux@orange.com>
Change-Id: I2a4b68f73797cd6c369060481e169525829a4217

Do you have any insights if it's the lab issue or it's really this patch that breaks sth?

> Do you have any insights if it's the lab issue or it's really this patch that breaks sth?

hmm in last 2 runs, the tests are PASS, no?
- legacy gating: https://logs.onap.org/onap-integration/gating//117758-3/index.html
- experimental gating: https://logs.onap.org/onap-integration/experimental-gating//117758-3/index.html

on last legacy gating 
- 1 error on basic_vm: this error is well known, we got a 500 from the SDC on VSP submission (https://logs.onap.org/onap-integration/gating//117758-3/smoke-usecases/basic_vm/basic_vm/reporting.html). This error seems to occur when we perform the tests in //. 
But we got an weird issue as far as I can see in the log
start of basic_vm: 2021-02-12 09:24:39,95 ????
start of basic_cnf: 2021-02-16 14:55:10,966
start of basic_networ: 2021-02-16 14:54:48,087
I had a look at the gitlab pipeline. the docker is started but reaches a timeout (https://gitlab.com/Orange-OpenSource/lfn/onap/xtesting-onap/-/jobs/1033712928). I was able to connect to the machine
2021-02-17 00:43:18,951 ERROR 48:basic_vm.py(1) - VF Module instantiation error
2021-02-17 00:43:18,951 - xtesting.ci.run_tests - INFO - Test result:

+-------------------+---------------------+------------------+----------------+
|     TEST CASE     |       PROJECT       |     DURATION     |     RESULT     |
+-------------------+---------------------+------------------+----------------+
|      basic_vm     |     integration     |      90:46       |      FAIL      |
as the test was longer than the timeout, we do not get the right logs
the error here is a problem SO/Openstack
But this error occured during the night on Orange gating pod, and I knwo we got a Ceph error (preventing the daily to be deployed..) so the root error is probably an DC issue

on experimenal gating
- only 1 error on basic_cnf (even if the test seems to be OK https://logs.onap.org/onap-integration/experimental-gating//117758-3/basic_cnf/basic_cnf/reporting.html)
